page_title: EmpireX — Where Project X Meets IRL Streaming Competition
meta_description: EmpireX — The world's first live-streamed reality experience. June 11-15, 2026 in Kissimmee, Florida. Streaming groups compete for social influence and a cash prize across 5 days, live on Kick. Invite only.
